onboarding.testimonialsSubtitle: Businesses across industries transformed customer communication with WhatsApp AI agents.

testimonials.quote: Evening reservation questions no longer wait. AI replies instantly and we just confirm.
testimonials.author: Mehmet A.

testimonials.quote: Guests ask about room availability and check-in on WhatsApp. They get instant answers even at midnight.
testimonials.author: Elif Y.

testimonials.quote: Appointment requests no longer slip through. Customers ask about services and AI answers right away.
testimonials.author: Zeynep K.

testimonials.quote: We used to get dozens of availability and pricing questions daily. Now they're all answered in seconds.
testimonials.author: Can D.

testimonials.quote: Our salon phone rang constantly. WhatsApp AI handles bookings so we can focus on clients.
testimonials.author: Ayşe T.

testimonials.quote: Order tracking and return questions kept customers waiting. Now both sides are happy.
testimonials.author: Burak S.

legal.label: Legal
legal.contactBody: If you have questions about these documents, you can reach us using the details below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Waai (WhatsApp AI Agent) platform operated by Mekanizma. By using the platform, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: 1. Parties and Definitions
paragraphs: Service provider: Mekanizma ("Mekanizma", "we", "us"). Product name: Waai / WhatsApp AI Agent. Website: https://waai.mekanizma.com.

"User" or "Customer" means any individual or legal entity that registers, subscribes, or otherwise uses the service. "End user" means people who message the Customer via WhatsApp, Messenger, or Instagram.

sections.heading: 2. Scope of the Service
paragraphs: Waai provides AI-assisted customer messaging across WhatsApp, Meta Messenger, Instagram DM and related channels, plus knowledge base tools, live handoff, appointment/ticket workflows, and a subscription panel.
Available features depend on the selected plan. Mekanizma may update features reasonably as the service evolves.

sections.heading: 3. Account and Responsibilities
paragraphs: You are responsible for the accuracy and security of your account. Notify us promptly of any unauthorized access.
list: Use the platform lawfully and in line with third-party terms (including Meta/WhatsApp) and these documents
Inform end users as required and obtain necessary consents
Do not send harmful, misleading, illegal, or spam content
Do not reverse engineer, overload, or attempt unauthorized access to the service

sections.heading: 4. Subscription and Payment
paragraphs: Paid plans are billed monthly or yearly as selected. Fees, taxes, and currency terms are stated at order or contract time.
Non-payment may lead to suspension or restricted access. Refunds follow the applicable plan terms unless otherwise agreed in writing.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The service may depend on WhatsApp, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), payment providers, and cloud infrastructure. Mekanizma is not liable for outages, policy changes, or account restrictions by those parties, but will provide reasonable support.

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: Platform software, UI, brands, and documentation belong to Mekanizma. Customers retain rights in their uploaded content (knowledge base, logos, etc.) and grant us a limited license to process that content to provide the service.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: The service is provided "as is". AI responses may be imperfect; human review is recommended for critical actions.

To the extent permitted by law, Mekanizma is not liable for indirect, incidental, or lost-profit damages, or for third-party acts. Aggregate liability is limited to fees paid for the relevant service in the prior 12 months.

sections.heading: 8. Termination
paragraphs: You may request account closure at any time. We may suspend or terminate for breach, payment issues, or legal requirements. After termination, data is handled under the Privacy Policy and Data Deletion page.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
paragraphs: These terms apply in the context of Mekanizma operating in the TRNC. Disputes should first be negotiated in good faith; otherwise Girne/TRNC authorities have jurisdiction (mandatory consumer rights reserved).

sections.heading: 10. Changes
paragraphs: We may update these terms by revising this page. For material changes we aim to notify you by email or in-panel notice. Continued use after an update means you accept the changes.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains which personal data Mekanizma collects when you use Waai, how it is processed, and what rights you have.

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: The data controller is Mekanizma. Address: Beşparmaklar Caddesi, No: 6, Çatalköy, Kyrenia, TRNC. Email: info@mekanizma.com. Phone: +90 533 850 77 61.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
paragraphs: To provide the service we may process the following categories of data:
list: Account data: name, email, company name, role, contact details
Subscription and billing data: plan, payment status, invoices
Messaging data: inbound/outbound message content via WhatsApp / Messenger / Instagram, media, timestamps, customer identifiers (e.g. phone numbers)
Technical data: IP address, device/browser info, session and security logs
Meta/Facebook connection data: page/account IDs, access tokens (stored securely), page/account names
Support tickets and panel usage records

sections.heading: 3. Purposes of Processing
paragraphs: We process data to provide and improve the service; generate AI replies; protect security and prevent fraud; bill and support customers; meet legal duties; and run product analytics (we do not sell data for personalized advertising).

sections.heading: 4. Legal Bases
paragraphs: Processing is based on contract performance, legitimate interests (security, product improvement), consent where required, and legal obligations.

sections.heading: 5. Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell your data. It may be shared only as needed with:
list: Infrastructure and hosting providers (e.g. cloud database)
Meta / WhatsApp APIs (to deliver messages)
Payment processors
Competent authorities when legally required

sections.heading: 6. Retention
paragraphs: Data is kept while the account is active and as required by law. After account closure or a deletion request, data is deleted or anonymized within a reasonable time unless legal retention applies. See the Data Deletion page for details.

sections.heading: 7. Security
paragraphs: We apply access controls, encrypted connections (HTTPS), secure token storage, and role restrictions. No system is 100% secure; we will notify you if a breach is suspected as required.

sections.heading: 8. Your Rights
paragraphs: Subject to applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, or objection. Contact info@mekanizma.com to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: 9. Cookies
paragraphs: We use essential cookies for session and security. Any analytics cookies are anonymized where practicable. You can manage cookies in your browser settings.

sections.heading: 10. Children
paragraphs: The service is not directed at anyone under 18. We do not knowingly collect children’s data.

deletion.title: Data Deletion Instructions
deletion.intro: This page explains how to delete data collected through Waai, including for Meta (Facebook / Instagram) app review and general user rights.

sections.heading: 1. What data can be deleted?
paragraphs: Upon request we can delete account details, company panel records, message history, support tickets, Meta connection tokens, and related profile/page mappings.
Data retained for legal reasons (e.g. invoices) or security may be kept only as long as the law requires.

sections.heading: 2. Deletion via the panel (business users)
paragraphs: If you can sign in to Waai:
list: Permanently remove Meta / WhatsApp connections from Settings or the Meta Integrations page
Open a Platform Support ticket or email info@mekanizma.com to request account closure or full data deletion
Use the subject line "Data Deletion Request" and include your registered email and company name

sections.heading: 3. Requests from Meta / Facebook users
paragraphs: If you want data from your Facebook or Instagram interactions with Waai deleted, email us with:
list: Your Facebook / Instagram user ID or profile link (if available)
Related phone number or chat identifier (if any)
The business or page name involved
The phrase "Meta data deletion request"

sections.heading: 4. How to submit a request
paragraphs: Email: info@mekanizma.com
Subject: Data Deletion Request — Waai

We may ask you to write from your registered email or provide enough identifiers to verify your identity. Requests are usually completed within 30 days; complex cases may take longer and we will notify you.

sections.heading: 5. After deletion
paragraphs: When deletion is complete, access tokens are revoked and related message/account data is removed or anonymized. Copies in backups may remain until the backup cycle ends, then are purged.
Deletion is irreversible. Reusing the service may require a new account or reconnection.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
paragraphs: Questions: info@mekanizma.com · +90 533 850 77 61 · Beşparmaklar Caddesi, No: 6, Çatalköy, Kyrenia, TRNC
